mnemonics: CRUD stands for Create, Read, Update, Delete
Create: Use findOneAndUpdate() or insert() to add new documents
keyPoints: Create: Use findOneAndUpdate() or insert() to add new documents
Read: Use findOne() or find() to retrieve documents
Projection: Use project() to select specific fields
Update: Use updateOne() or updateMany() to modify existing documents
Delete: Use remove() or deleteMany() to delete documents
Aggregate: Use aggregate() to perform complex operations
MongoDB Node.js Driver: Use the driver to interact with MongoDB
Schema Initialization: Use mongoose to define schema
Reading from MongoDB: Use the driver or mongoose to read from MongoDB
Write: Use the driver or mongoose to write to MongoDB
